channel.title: Adventureville on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Adventureville on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Daily Blogroll Oct 12: No time for heroes edition
item.description: A few days ago I was trying to define what I thought of as an MMO. I started off thinking it was just a realtime, online game with other players, but as the day went on, thinking about it more, I felt it had to include a persistent avatar representing the player that could be named and customized. I was pretty confident that nailed the essential nature of an MMORPG.
